name: Mam Tor
description: Iconic ridge walk. Easy stroll up from Mam Nick car park at the top of Winnats Pass. Paragliders launch from the top in good weather.

name: Winnats Pass
description: Dramatic limestone gorge road between Castleton and the Mam Tor ridge.

name: Blue John Cavern
description: Cavern at the top of Winnats Pass, source of the rare Blue John stone.

name: Speedwell Cavern
description: The boat one — underground canal trip at the bottom of Winnats Pass.

name: Peveril Castle
description: Norman ruin perched above Castleton with sweeping Hope Valley views (English Heritage).

name: Castleton village
description: Pretty stone village with cafés, pubs, and (apparently) excellent ice cream.
